title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is not accepted [Android]
scenario: User denies location permission during Android onboarding but the permission flow does not properly handle the rejection and fails to proceed.
steps: 1. Launch the app on an Android device
3. Proceed to the 'Find My Device' flow
4. When the location permission prompt appears, tap 'Deny'
5. Observe the behavior after denying the permission
expected: The user should be able to skip the location permission step and continue with the onboarding process after denying the permission.
